attributes.action: Ban vape shops from trading in listed buildings
attributes.additional_details: Following the disastrous fire in Glasgow in early March 2026, I do not wish to see similar occurrences with other historical (or any) buildings.
attributes.background: Following the disastrous fire in Glasgow, I wish the government to pass legislation to restrict vape shops existing within, or in close proximity to, historically listed buildings due to the fire risk that they pose.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763732
